raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a dispute on XX/XX/year> with an American Express credit card for 2 charges from a moving company ( XX/XX/year> {$2100.00} which was the initial deposit and XX/XX/year> for {$1200.00} a second deposit pre move date.. 

The reason for my dispute is that a moving company called XXXX XXXX refuse to refund my credit card. 
I called and scheduled moving services to move my furniture from XXXX  to XXXX  scheduled on XX/XX/year>. 
It is my understanding that this company is currently under investigation by the State of XXXX  and I can understand why. 

This is a classic case of bait and switch where the day before the move I was asked to provide a complete list of all items to be moved along with photos, which I provided and based on this information I was provided an updated quote the day before the move which I agreed to and accepted. 

The amount quoted and agreed upon was {$6800.00} however, when the movers finally arrived at XXXX where they were scheduled for XXXX XXXX, they looked at the items and wanted to charge me an additional XXXX for a total of over {$12000.00}, At this time i attempted to contact XXXX several times within a XXXX minute period and no one answered nor called me back. 
I was beyond upset as clearly these people are attempting to take advantage of a single woman at XXXX XXXX  figuring that I would agree to anything to get my things from XXXX  to XXXX. I told these crooks to get off of my property before I call the Police and file a report, Now I am faced with this company XXXX XXXX refusing to refund my deposit and when I filed a dispute with my credit card they stated that I never cancelled the services with XXXX. 
I had no reason to cancel prior to the move date as I had accepted the initial quote the day prior to the scheduled move. I am now out {$3400.00} plus I had to rent a XXXX  and pay people to load all and drive the truck to XXXX  myself and almost killed myself in the process. 
Please help me in this matter as I was directed to your department for assistance. 
I have also filed a complaint with the XXXX  Attorney General 's office.
